data.title: Encryption at Rest and Transit
data.description: Ensures data security and integrity by encrypting both stored data and data in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES for data at rest.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Multiple layers of user verification processes to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Uses OAuth 2.0 and SAML for secure access controls.

data.title: Continuous Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors and responds to security threats in real-time across all services.
data.technical_spec: Combines machine learning with manual review for anomaly detection.

data.title: Incident Response Team
data.description: A dedicated team to quickly respond to and mitigate security breaches.
data.technical_spec: Follows a structured incident response plan with defined protocols.

data.title: Penetration Testing and Security Audits
data.description: Regularly conducted to identify and address vulnerabilities proactively.
data.technical_spec: Third-party and internal testing cycles using tools like Metasploit.
